name: General Practice
description: Everyday medical care, checkups, referrals and long-term condition management.

name: Cardiology
description: Diagnosis and treatment of heart and cardiovascular conditions.

name: Paediatrics
description: Medical care for infants, children and adolescents.

name: Endocrinology & Diabetes
description: Hormonal health and diabetes diagnosis, treatment and management.

name: Dermatology
description: Skin, hair and nail conditions.

name: Gynaecology
description: Women's reproductive health.

name: General Dentistry
description: Checkups, fillings, cleaning and everyday oral health care.

name: Orthodontics
description: Braces, aligners and correction of teeth and jaw alignment.

name: Root Canal Treatment
description: Treatment of infected or damaged tooth pulp.

name: Cosmetic Dentistry
description: Veneers, whitening and smile aesthetics.

name: Oral Surgery
description: Tooth extractions, implants and surgical procedures.

name: Cognitive Behavioural Therapy
description: Structured talking therapy for anxiety, depression and stress.

name: Trauma & PTSD
description: Support for trauma, PTSD and migration-related distress.

name: Family Therapy
description: Support for family relationships and conflict.

name: Child Psychology
description: Emotional and behavioural support for children.

name: Musculoskeletal Physiotherapy
description: Treatment of muscle, joint and back pain.

name: Sports Injury Rehabilitation
description: Recovery and rehabilitation from sports injuries.

name: Post-Surgical Rehabilitation
description: Recovery support following surgery.

name: Weight Management
description: Personalised nutrition plans for healthy weight management.

name: Diabetes Nutrition
description: Dietary management of type 1 and type 2 diabetes.

name: Sports Nutrition
description: Nutrition planning for athletic performance and recovery.
